item.title: You love to see it. United we stand.
item.description: I can't understand how police think they can come stop people from talking when this is EXACTLY what the first amendment is about. "Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof; or abridging the freedom of speech, or of the press; or the right of the people peaceably to assemble, and to petition the Government for a redress of grievances." !!!to petition the Government for a redress of grievances!!! "Tonight, July 21, another packed Grayslake board meeting had residents and allies from across Lake County demanding action be taken to stop the T5 hyperscale data center. The village board limited comments and had police escort away commenters who went over the two minute limit. After Mayor Elizabeth Davies ended the meeting before all Grayslake residents present could speak, one resident took to the microphone to give her comments anyway. Community members formed a wall around her so she could give it without interruption by police. Big tech and the billionaires pushing data centers into our communities may have the money, but our communities have the people power. We can organize together to win a society for the workers, not the billionaires."
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Benjamin Netanyahu is a war criminal.
item.description: https://x.com/NYCMayor
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: Prior Fucking Authorization
item.description: Imagine calling a surgeon during a fucking cancer operation because an insurance spreadsheet needed attention. Somewhere in corporate America, a middle manager thought, "Yes, interrupt the person holding the scalpel." That's not healthcare. That's bureaucratic brain damage. Then, after she spoke publicly, the response wasn't, "Let's investigate." It was, "Here's a threatening six-page letter demanding you shut the fuck up." Nothing screams "We're definitely the good guys" like sending legal threats to doctors. Healthcare executives love saying patients come first... right up until profits wander into the room. Apparently the treatment plan is: deny, delay, intimidate, then act shocked when people get pissed off. What a spectacular pile of motherfucking bullshit. If doctors risk legal intimidation for telling the public what's happening behind the curtain, the system isn't protecting patients—it's protecting shareholders. That's fucked. ⚖️ #Healthcare #HealthInsurance #PatientRights #UnitedHealthcare #MedicalEthics
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: I'm sorting through Charles McBryde's content and this I thought worth sharing
item.description: Laos is like a monument to all of America's sins, the dreadful result of Kissinger's decision to expand the Vietnam War beyond the borders of that country and into its neighborhood. For years, the United States has been paying to clean up the residue of its ill-conceived misadventure in Southeast Asia, but as the current administration cuts aid money and withdraws from the global stage, Laos is left to atone for America's sins all on its own. - Charles McBryde

item.title: The little metal piece that holds a pencil eraser is called a ferrule
item.description: Blackwing released a start to finish "how it's made" video for their pencils. It starts in Japan with making the graphite. The whole thing is about eight minutes long, and reminded me of my favorite scenes of Mister Rogers when I was a kid. Source for more: https://youtu.be/fow-LsdaH2E

item.description:

25
26 Man Tax: Alex Hafner
Since we are destined to live out our lives in the prison of our minds, our one duty is to furnish it well. -Peter Ustinov So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.

item.title: Wow
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/california-research-grants-terminated-keywords-lawsuit-a0ddb01413ecb68d9668490a20be6207 As someone who was an essential worker and was left disabled by Covid and had to watch most of the research efforts here in California and the US go up in smoke, this boils my blood. Not only did trump and his administrations propaganda, dereliction of duty, lies, dismissal, and apathy surrounding Covid ultimately cause my disability, and not only did him and his administration come right back in and destroy most of the research efforts, but they just plugged a keyword into an ai bot and canceled it all based on that. And that’s not even talking about all the cancer research and all the other research that popped up because it mentioned diversity and gender and things like that.

item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Last time I looked it said $120K..
item.description: I got my degree in 2011 and started a nonprofit in 2013. I didn't pay myself for the first 8 years as I grew it. 60 to 80 hour weeks with no pay and the most supportive wife in the world. Obama started the nonprofit program I used, which pays off the balance of your student loans if you make the right number of minimum payments for 10 years. Due to COVID and the constant assholery of the Republican administrations, it has become harder and harder to qualify, and it took a few more than 10 years to get the payments made. I made the last payment I 'needed' in February, but it took until yesterday for them to click the button and Do The Thing. 2 days ago I was still $120,000.00 in debt for college. Now I own my brain! Celebration time! EDIT: looks like it was signed into law in 2007 by Bush. 2nd edit: first post to make most viral! Send those bobs!

item.dc:creator: unimaginativeperson

item.description:
A solar hole larger than 80 Earths is currently facing our planet A giant hole more than 620,000 miles (1 million kilometres) long has opened in the Sun's atmosphere and is facing Earth, where it is expected to send a stream of fast-moving solar wind our way later this week. Despite the name, a coronal hole is not a hole in the Sun itself. Instead, it is a region where the Sun's magnetic field opens into space, allowing charged particles to escape much more easily than usual. These high-speed streams of solar wind can travel at more than 500 miles per second (800 kilometres per second). When they reach Earth, they interact with our planet's magnetic field, sometimes triggering geomagnetic storms. Most people won't notice anything unusual. However, stronger geomagnetic activity can produce brighter auroras, especially across northern parts of the United States, Canada and Europe. In some cases, it can also cause minor disruptions to radio communications, GPS signals and satellite operations. Unlike powerful solar flares or coronal mass ejections, coronal holes usually produce longer-lasting but less intense space weather. They are a common feature of the Sun's 11-year activity cycle and can influence Earth's magnetic environment for several days at a time. Scientists will continue monitoring the coronal hole to determine how strong the incoming solar wind stream will be and whether any geomagnetic storm watches become necessary. https://earthsky.org/sun/sun-news-activity-solar-flare-cme-aurora-updates/ SPACE WEATHER FORECAST: 7..26 - Coronal Hole May Bring Storming Conditions https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=c0HEjD1lrww
A rare anemone active region AR 4493 has developed INSIDE the large coronal hole facing Earth. This has essentially split the coronal hole in two as active regions have large, overarching CLOSED magnetic fields which basically "repel" coronal holes and open magnetic field lines. The coronal hole is already affecting Earth. I will make a post soon, but the magnetic field strength of the solar wind is >15 nT, or around 3x stronger than usual. There is a chance of mid-latitude aurora tonight if conditions hold. This is conditional on having clear, dark, and smoke-free skies.

item.title: Walkies and Sploots
item.description:
Look at this cuteness!!! Best brothers <3
Earlier walkies today, they're so good in their harnesses
Bear knows EXACTLY where we're going
Okay so, please don't crucify me but... Walking two cats is hard with a single person. Fortunately Bob was pretty chill today. So Bear pulled me around and Bob actually did a great job of following along on his own. I think I might have some extendable leashes still, but for today this worked okay. I accept this is NOT the way to do things.
Here he is just following be and Bear around
Bear looking over the deck
Bob doing the same in almost the same spot lol
Partial sploots
Better sploots
Its hot today, the boys were done, we came inside
Supervised self walkies on the back deck

item.title: GovBrief Today #537
item.description: Donald Trump gave Saudi Arabia a path to enriched uranium while bombing Iran for already having one. American companies have long been legally barred from helping Saudi Arabia go nuclear. AP sources say Trump just approved a 30-year deal that allows US firms to help the Saudis enrich uranium on their own soil without the toughest international inspections. He approved it on the 11th straight night of American bombs falling on Iran, five months into a war he says exists to stop them from enriching uranium. The United States and Israel launched a regional war over one country's centrifuges. Now Trump is selling them to another. We owe the world an explanation for the difference. I've emailed 8,326 stories over 537 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260721-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/bridge-ceremony [2] https://go.govbrief.today/saudi-nuclear [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july21 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/ca-mn-medicaid [5] https://go.govbrief.today/cyclospora-rfk [6] https://go.govbrief.today/measles-war [7] https://go.govbrief.today/nj-elections [8] https://go.govbrief.today/war-cost [9] https://go.govbrief.today/clayton-advances [10] https://go.govbrief.today/biden-appeal [11] https://go.govbrief.today/navarro-appeal [12] https://go.govbrief.today/rogoff-sues [13] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-bbc-discovery [14] https://go.govbrief.today/cornyn-pepfar [15] https://go.govbrief.today/house-funding [16] https://go.govbrief.today/mspb-independent [17] https://go.govbrief.today/mi-literacy [18] https://go.govbrief.today/witness-deportation Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/

item.title: Gone off the deep hand.
item.description: Catfish noodling (also called grabbling, hogging, or catfisting) is a method of catching catfish using only your bare hands. Noodlers wade into rivers or lakes, find underwater cavities where catfish nest, use their hand as bait to provoke a defensive bite, and wrestle the fish out of the water.

item.title: Hmmmm
item.dc:creator: FrogDeKermit

item.title: Lost Brothers, gone forever...
item.description: My oldest brother was my only true friend. He was the dearest human being to me. I could always trust him! And he trusted me! No conditions, just love and trust. My 'middle' brother was a wild one but I loved him the same. I could not trust him, he himself couldn't trust him. But he was a free spirit and a loved brother. I only had two. Now I have none. They left me back here, alone, sick and in pain. And, now, without anyone to call to when in need. 3 days ago mother wasn't well, bloodpreasure of 80over40! I was very worried and wanted to call my brother or my other brother to ask for advice. And then it hit me!!! From now on it will be me! I will have to take care of what's left. Me and me alone. The youngest, the smartest but also the poorest and sickest. Before we would take turns me and the oldest. We took care of our parents together. The middle one lived in another city and couldn't i.e. drive father to the ER. Or just go and check on them quickly. But stll we were a Trio! No I'm alone. I don't have friends really. I don't have a wife, never did. So when it comes to my parents and two nieces it is now all up to me. How in Freyas name can I not fail carrying all this responsibility alone? And it's not even that which is hardest. Hardest is never again to hear them laugh, have a beer, just be together! I miss them both so hard! And I feel I am the only one who truly knew them! For I was there, all their lives, knew all their secrets, knew their fears and issues and all that live throws at you. Even the stuff they didn't tell their wifes, GF, our parents. I and only I knew them fully. So once I die....we will all be gone. My whole family tree will die with me. Our branch will die out. No male heirs left but me and I'm 50, sick and alone. Always have been. So our name-branche dies with me. I will be the last. I always thought the oldest would be the one burrying me. Instead I burried him. I took care of all his affairs. I made shure his wishes and his honour were respected! It was not a simple task. It was hard, very hard! And it caused that it took me months until I could start mourning him. And then I get hit with another dead brother. And I miss him too! At least in his case it's his wife who has to take care of everything. It's not fair but I'm glad I do not have to do it again. But it changes nothing. I am truly alone now! Like really! Who will burry me? Probably it will fall to the city ?‍♂️ My whole life I was lonely but I had my brothers!!! Now.....I parents older than Methusalem and two nieces to watch over. It is too much to do alone. And the hole in my chest is so large..... ??? I miss them so hard. I know, I'm not the first and neither the last to experience loss. But it's hell! ?
item.dc:creator: Bollramm

item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: Hate to anger the mob, but
item.description: Just need to vent, so don't bother with comments, just downvote & move on. I won't be answering. Every step has been an uphill battle. I need 2 'support' apps for every task I want to do, and each of those is some unknown CLI command that does god-knows what & I end up with bloatware that I can't get rid of. (like WTF is XTerm & 2ND XTerm and why would I need it when I already have a perfectly fine Terminal!?) I've re-installed Ubuntu 3 times now, because an command that should have solved my problems made the whole thing worse. And the instability - it's all slow, especially multitasking, and it just feels like if I don't walk carefully then it's all going to crumble down. Especially with Lutris. The system tray icon likes to just disappear & the only way to get it back is a complete reboot. And on each startup of Lutris, it says it can't find WINE until it sits there chewing on it for several minutes. And I'm doing reboots 10x more than I ever did on Windows. Install an app, reboot. Change a major setting, reboot. Simply remove icon shortcuts, reboot needed before they actually disappear. Like WTF is going on? Everyone, even the noobs, seem to just have a plug & play experience, yet my default install didn't come with any .zip extractors, didn't have any tools to run/install .deb files. Every guide says Ubuntu is just double-click to run, yet there's nothing on my machine to run these files. I'm using the official ISO, nothing special, default installation. I haven't even put any extensions on it And the passwords being required to do literally anything & everything! I'm just so tired of the OS being in my way when I want to do something. /rant
item.dc:creator: DarkYeti
